interfaces.name: loginWithCredentials
interfaces.description: Authenticate the single test user so account features (wishlist, bookings) are available.

interfaces.name: getAuthStatus
interfaces.description: Return whether the single user is currently logged in.

interfaces.name: getHomeFeaturedContent
interfaces.description: Get featured content for the homepage including classes, courses, workshops, kids’ classes, passes, and special offers.

interfaces.name: searchGlobalOfferings
interfaces.description: Global search from the homepage across classes, workshops, courses, and passes by keyword.

interfaces.name: getHomeQuickActions
interfaces.description: Return shortcut action definitions for the homepage (book a class, buy a pass, purchase a gift card).

interfaces.name: getClassListingFilterOptions
interfaces.description: Get available filter options for a class listings context such as all classes, online classes, kids & teens, or workshops.

interfaces.name: searchClassOfferings
interfaces.description: Search and filter class offerings for the Class Listings page.

startDate.description: ISO date string for custom range start

endDate.description: ISO date string for custom range end

interfaces.name: getClassOfferingDetail
interfaces.description: Get full details for a specific class, workshop, or course for the Class Detail page.

bookingCtaLabel.description: e.g., 'Book Now', 'Book Workshop', 'Book Course', 'Enroll for Free'

interfaces.name: getClassOfferingSchedulingOptions
interfaces.description: Return upcoming single-session and course-instance options for a class, including dates, days, and time-of-day, for use in the Class Detail calendar.

parameters.name: startDate
parameters.description: ISO date string for earliest date to include

parameters.name: endDate
parameters.description: ISO date string for latest date to include

interfaces.name: getClassOfferingAddons
interfaces.description: Return optional add-ons (such as materials kits) for a class offering.

interfaces.name: getBookingSummaryForSelection
interfaces.description: Generate a booking summary (date, time, participants, add-ons, and price breakdown) for the Booking Summary / Enrollment page before confirmation.

parameters.name: classSessionId
parameters.description: Required for single classes, workshops, and trials when booking a specific session.

parameters.name: courseInstanceId
parameters.description: Required for multi-week courses when booking a specific course instance.

interfaces.name: confirmBooking
interfaces.description: Create a confirmed booking using the selected class, date, participants, add-ons, attendee info, and payment method.

parameters.name: attendeeName
parameters.description: Required for enrollments where attendee info is collected.

interfaces.name: getWishlistItems
interfaces.description: Return all wishlist items for the single user with key class details.

interfaces.name: addClassOfferingToWishlist
interfaces.description: Add a class offering to the single user’s wishlist from list or detail view.

interfaces.name: removeWishlistItem
interfaces.description: Remove a wishlist entry.

interfaces.name: getWorkshopCompareState
interfaces.description: Get the current workshop compare bar state (what workshops are selected for comparison).

interfaces.name: addWorkshopToCompare
interfaces.description: Add a workshop (ClassOffering of type 'workshop') to the current comparison list.

interfaces.name: removeWorkshopFromCompare
interfaces.description: Remove a workshop from the comparison list.

interfaces.name: clearWorkshopCompareList
interfaces.description: Clear all workshops from the comparison list.

interfaces.name: getWorkshopComparisonView
interfaces.description: Return side-by-side comparison data for workshops in the compare list for the Compare Workshops page.

interfaces.name: getPassFilterOptions
interfaces.description: Return available filter options for the Passes & Packages page.

interfaces.name: searchPassProducts
interfaces.description: Search and filter pass/package products for the Passes & Packages page.

interfaces.name: getPassProductDetail
interfaces.description: Get full details for a specific pass or package for the Pass / Package Detail page.

interfaces.name: getPassCheckoutSummary
interfaces.description: Generate a checkout summary for purchasing a pass/package, including promo code impact.

parameters.name: startDate
parameters.description: ISO date string for pass activation date

interfaces.name: completePassPurchase
interfaces.description: Complete purchase of a pass/package, creating an Order and PassPurchase.

interfaces.name: getGiftCardOptions
interfaces.description: Return available gift card products and configuration rules for the Gift Cards page.

interfaces.name: getGiftCardConfigurationSummary
interfaces.description: Validate and summarize a configured gift card (amount, delivery, recipient, message) before adding to cart.

interfaces.name: addConfiguredGiftCardToCart
interfaces.description: Add a configured gift card to the single user’s cart (creating the cart if needed).

interfaces.name: getCartSummary
interfaces.description: Return the current cart contents (gift cards and passes) for the Cart page.

interfaces.name: updateCartItemQuantity
interfaces.description: Update the quantity of a cart item.

interfaces.name: removeCartItem
interfaces.description: Remove an item from the cart.

interfaces.name: clearCart
interfaces.description: Remove all items from the cart.

interfaces.name: getCartCheckoutSummary
interfaces.description: Generate a checkout summary for the current cart, including optional promo code application.

interfaces.name: completeCartPurchase
interfaces.description: Complete purchase for the current cart, creating an Order (and any GiftCard/PassPurchase records).

interfaces.name: getMyBookingsSummary
interfaces.description: Return upcoming and past bookings for the single user for the My Bookings page.

interfaces.name: getBookingDetail
interfaces.description: Return full details for a specific booking for the Booking Detail page.

interfaces.name: getRescheduleOptions
interfaces.description: Return allowed future session options for rescheduling a booking, respecting a minimum 14-day change window and same time slot when possible.

interfaces.name: rescheduleBooking
interfaces.description: Reschedule a booking to a new class session, enforcing the minimum 14-day change rule.

interfaces.name: getAboutPageContent
interfaces.description: Return content for the About page, including mission, background, instructors, and studio summaries.

interfaces.name: getContactPageContent
interfaces.description: Return static contact info for the Contact page.

interfaces.name: submitContactRequest
interfaces.description: Submit a contact form request (e.g., general question, group booking, special event).

interfaces.name: getFaqContent
interfaces.description: Return FAQ entries for the FAQ page, including booking, rescheduling, passes, gift cards, and promo codes.

interfaces.name: getTermsContent
interfaces.description: Return legal text for the Terms & Conditions page.

interfaces.name: getPrivacyPolicyContent
interfaces.description: Return text for the Privacy Policy page.

helperFunctions.name: _getOrCreateCart
helperFunctions.description: Internal helper to load or create the single-user cart in storage.

helperFunctions.name: _getOrCreateWishlist
helperFunctions.description: Internal helper to load or create the single-user wishlist.

helperFunctions.name: _getOrCreateWorkshopCompareList
helperFunctions.description: Internal helper to load or create the current workshop comparison list.

helperFunctions.name: _calculateBookingPrice
helperFunctions.description: Internal helper to calculate booking totals from class, session/course instance, participants, and add-ons.

helperFunctions.name: _calculateCartTotals
helperFunctions.description: Internal helper to compute cart subtotal, discounts, and totals.

helperFunctions.name: _validatePromoCode
helperFunctions.description: Internal helper to validate a promo code against order context and compute discount.

helperFunctions.name: _enforceRescheduleWindow
helperFunctions.description: Internal helper to enforce minimum 14-day reschedule window for bookings.

helperFunctions.name: _authState
helperFunctions.description: Internal storage for single-user authentication status.
